info.name: EduPro Backend API
info.description:
EduPro Backend API - Frontend Friendly Collection

Quick Start (Beginner to Pro):
1) Run login request from Auth folder (Admin/Teacher/Student/Parent).
2) Save JWT into variable: token.
3) Use other endpoints by role-tag and folder guide.

Role Legend:
- [ADMIN]: Only admin token
- [TEACHER]: Only teacher token
- [STUDENT]: Only student token
- [PARENT]: Only parent token
- [AUTH]: Any logged-in user

Pagination Convention:
- page (starts at 1)
- pageSize (usually 10, max depends on endpoint)

Filter Convention:
- search for text query
- classId/subjectId/status/date range where applicable
- Keep empty to fetch all

item.name: Health
[PUBLIC] Get Health Status

request.description: Check server health status with detailed information

item.description:
Frontend Guide:
Role: PUBLIC
Call: GET {{baseUrl}}/health
Auth: No token needed.
Pagination: Not required.
Filters: none.
Response Handling: read success/data/message fields from JSON response.

item.name: [PUBLIC] Ping

request.description: Simple ping endpoint

item.description:
Frontend Guide:
Role: PUBLIC
Call: GET {{baseUrl}}/health/ping
Auth: No token needed.
Pagination: Not required.
Filters: none.
Response Handling: read success/data/message fields from JSON response.
Role: Public. Use for API liveness checks before calling secure endpoints.
